title: 舌戦開幕！賛美の湯 2話 今夜だけは仲良しⅢX

script.text: franさんに「緊急事態！」と言われて来たんですが

translations.en: fran-san told me "emergency situation!" and called me here.

script.text: 一体、何があったんですか！？

translations.en: What on earth happened!?

script.text: 今すぐ宿を変えて下さい！！

translations.en: Change the inn right now!!

script.text: こんな所で一晩を過ごすなんて絶対無理！

translations.en: Spending the night in a place like this is absolutely impossible!

script.text: fran、貴方何考えてるの

translations.en: Fran‚ what are you thinking?

script.text: 幽霊がいたなんて理由で、わざわざ

translations.en: Calling {user} here just because of a ghost

script.text: {user}さんを呼びつけるなんて

translations.en: is not a reasonable thing to do.

script.text: これも仕事ですから……いや、幽霊が出たと聞いたんで

translations.en:
Well‚ this is also part of the job…
I mean‚ I heard there was a ghost.

script.text: 一応、応援も連れて来たんですけどね

translations.en: So I brought some support just in case.

script.text: あのね、実は芽衣、幽霊が……

translations.en: You see‚ actually‚ Mei loves the occult and ghosts…

script.text: じ、実は芽衣はオカルトとか幽霊が大好きなんですよ！

translations.en: Uh‚ actually‚ Mei is really into the occult and ghosts!

script.text: だから今回みたいな件には適任と思いましてですね！

translations.en: So I thought she would be suitable for a situation like this!

script.text: 私は、たまたま事務所にいたら

translations.en: I happened to be at the office‚

script.text: {user}君が「温泉に行きませんか」って

translations.en: and {user}-kun asked‚ "Do you want to go to a hot spring?"

script.text: ……まさかそれが幽霊旅館だったなんてね、あはは

translations.en: …I never expected it to be a haunted inn‚ hahaha.

script.text: あ～、アホくさ

translations.en: Ugh‚ this is so dumb.

script.text: みんなして幽霊がどうとか騒いでさ、バカじゃないの

translations.en: Everyone is making a fuss about ghosts and stuff‚ it's ridiculous.

script.text: だから、私は本当に見たんだって！

translations.en: That's why I'm saying I really saw it!

script.text: と……とにかく、今から宿を変えるのは難しいので

translations.en: A-anyway‚ it's difficult to change the inn now‚

script.text: 原因が分かればfranさんも安心して休めますよね？

translations.en: but if we find out the cause‚ fran-san can rest easy‚ right?

script.text: う……それなら、まぁ……

translations.en: Well… in that case…

script.text: うん、みんなで頑張ろー！

translations.en: Yeah‚ let's do our best together!

script.text: 頑張って調べれば、きっと怖い原因も分かるよ

translations.en: If we investigate‚ we'll surely find out the scary cause too.

script.text: ――温泉旅館を調べる一行

translations.en: ――The group examining a hot spring ryokan

script.text: はあ……

translations.en: Sigh…

script.text: まさか、本番前日にこんなことになるなんて

translations.en:
I can't believe this is happening on
the day before the performance.

script.text: おかしな足音に、奇妙な人影……

translations.en: Strange footsteps‚ bizarre figures…

script.text: 古い建物だし、変な音がしても不思議ではないけど

translations.en: It's an old building‚ so weird noises are not surprising‚ but…

script.text: なんで、それをkanaが調べないといけないんだか

translations.en: Why do I have to investigate that?

script.text: 一緒に歩き回るより、手分けして調べた方が早いわね

translations.en: It's faster to split up and search than to walk around together.

script.text: 私は上の階を見てくるわ。貴方達は下から……

translations.en: I'll check the upper floors. You all check from below…

script.text: ちょっと、そう言ってあんただけサボる気でしょ！？

translations.en: Hey‚ you're just trying to slack off by saying that‚ aren't you!?

script.text: な～んだ、さんざん偉そうなこと言って

translations.en: Oh‚ come on‚ you've been talking so big‚

script.text: あなただって、実は怖いんじゃない

translations.en: but maybe you're actually scared.

script.text: は！？　kanaがビビってる訳ないじゃん

translations.en: What!? Like I'd be scared!

script.text: あんたの目、今度こそバカになったんじゃない！？

translations.en: Are your eyes playing tricks on you this time!?

script.text: まさか、ここまで仲が悪いとはねえ……

translations.en: I can't believe their relationship is this bad…

script.text: 同じグループの仲間なのにね

translations.en: Even though they're in the same group…

script.text: 喧嘩ばっかりで、一緒にアイドル活動出来るのかなあ？

translations.en: Always fighting‚ I wonder if they can do idol activities together?

script.text: あれでも一時はBIG4だった人達だから

translations.en: They were part of the BIG4 at one point‚

script.text: プロ意識は高いんでしょうけど……

translations.en: so they must have a high level of professionalism…

script.text: うーん……芽衣は、月ストのみんなと

translations.en: Hmm… Mei wouldn't want to become

script.text: あんなに仲が悪くなっちゃうのは嫌だなー

translations.en: so distant from the Moon Tempest members like that.

script.text: おいそこ聞こえてんぞ！？

translations.en: Hey‚ we can hear you‚ you know!?

script.text: BIG4だったのが一時だけとか、余計なお世話！！

translations.en:
It's none of your business whether we were part
of the BIG4 for only a short time or not!!

script.text: ひえっ、聞かれてた！！

translations.en: Eek‚ they heard me!!

script.text: それにしても、なかなか『幽霊』の原因が分からないな

translations.en: Anyway‚ we still can't figure out the cause of the "ghost" quite yet.

script.text: 建物が古いせいか、それとも誰かとすれ違ったか

translations.en:
Maybe it's because the building is old‚
or perhaps we crossed paths with someone.

script.text: 本物の幽霊が、ぽこぽこ出る訳でもないだろうし……

translations.en: It's unlikely that real ghosts are just popping up left and right…

script.text: ねえねえ、{user}さん

translations.en: Hey‚ {user}-san.

script.text: 探してるの、もしかしてこの人じゃないかな？

translations.en: I wonder if this person we're looking for might be you?

script.text: ……この人？

translations.en: …This person?

script.text: その、俺には芽衣しかいないように見えるんだが……

translations.en: Um‚ from where I'm standing‚ it looks like there's only Mei here…

script.text: ああそっか

translations.en: Oh‚ I see.

script.text: {user}さんには見えないもんね

translations.en: You can't see it‚ {user}-san.

script.text: えっと、この辺りに幽霊のお爺さんが立ってるの

translations.en: Well‚ there's a ghost grandpa standing around here.

script.text: 本当に幽霊がいたのか！？

translations.en: There really was a ghost!?

script.text: そ……それで芽衣、お爺さんはなんて言ってる……？

translations.en: S-so‚ Mei‚ what is the grandpa saying…?

script.text: ええとね、「うるさい！」だって

translations.en: Well‚ he's saying‚ "Noisy!"

script.text: こんなにうるさいと寝られない、って言ってる

translations.en: He says he can't sleep because it's so noisy.

script.text: 特に、近くで喧嘩されるのが凄いストレスなんだって

translations.en: He especially gets stressed out when people nearby are fighting.

script.text: それは……暴言を吐く人が同僚にいるだけで

translations.en:
I see… It's like the stories about how just having
someone in the team who uses harsh language

script.text: チーム全体の生産性が下がるとか、そういう話か？

translations.en: can decrease the overall productivity of the team‚ right?

script.text: うーん、芽衣はよく分かんないけど

translations.en: Hmm‚ Mei doesn't really understand‚ but

script.text: お爺さんは凄い勢いで頷いてる

translations.en: the grandpa is vigorously nodding.

script.text: な、なるほど……

translations.en: I see…

script.text: スリクスは三人集まるといつも喧嘩になるからな……

translations.en:
So‚ it's because IIIx always ends up fighting
whenever all three of them are together…

script.text: 芽衣、スリクスさん達にも話してこようか？

translations.en: Mei‚ should I tell the IIIx about your sixth sense?

script.text: いや、芽衣の霊感のことは黙っておいた方がいい

translations.en: No‚ it's better to keep quiet about your sensitivity‚ Mei.

script.text: 俺がかわりに、なんとか説明してみる

translations.en: I'll try to explain it somehow instead.

script.text: ああっ！　今、この宿の口コミを調べていたら

translations.en: Ah! I was just checking the reviews of this inn‚

script.text: 幽霊が出るらしいという書き込みを見つけました！

translations.en: and I found a post saying that there are ghosts here!

script.text: やっぱりそうじゃん！！

translations.en: See‚ I told you!

script.text: ほら見なさいよ、私の勘違いじゃなかったでしょ！？

translations.en: Look‚ it wasn't my imagination‚ right!?

script.text: 今のなんかわざとらしくなかったかしら……

translations.en: I wonder if that last one was too deliberate…

script.text: いや、俺も気になって調べたんですけど

translations.en: Well‚ I was curious too and looked it up‚

script.text: そんなに悪さをする幽霊じゃなさそうだったんですよ

translations.en: but the ghost doesn't seem to be causing much trouble.

script.text: ただ静かに過ごしたいだけの幽霊で……

translations.en: It seems like it just wants to have a peaceful existence.

script.text: みなさんが仲良くしてる限り、何も起こさないそうです

translations.en: As long as you all get along‚ it won't do anything.

script.text: はあ。仲良く……

translations.en: Sigh… Get along…

script.text: 仲良く、ねえ……

translations.en: Get along‚ huh…

script.text: 何それ、アホくさ

translations.en: What's that? It's ridiculous.

script.text: いや、一応、忠告はちゃんと聞いた方がいいと……

translations.en: Well‚ at least‚ it's better to heed the warning…

script.text: こんな騒ぎに付き合わされて、もうウンザリなの

translations.en: I'm fed up with being dragged into this commotion.

script.text: あんたまで幽霊がどうとか言いだして、バカじゃん！？

translations.en: You talking about ghosts now too? Are you serious!?

script.text: ひいっ！　またガシャンって！！

translations.en: Eek! It's making noise again!!

script.text: ほら見なさいよ幽霊ちゃんといるじゃないっ！！

translations.en: Look‚ the ghost is here with us‚ see!!?

script.text: 幽霊が、幽霊が私達に怒ってるのよ！！

translations.en: The ghost is angry at us!!

script.text: …………嘘でしょ

translations.en: …This can't be true.

script.text: と、とにかくですね、今夜だけでもみなさん仲良く……

translations.en: A-anyway‚ for tonight at least‚ let's all get along…

script.text: 分かりました！

translations.en: Understood!

script.text: ええ、もうすっごい頑張って仲良くします！！

translations.en: Yes‚ we'll really try our best to get along!!

script.text: マジかよ……

translations.en: Seriously…

script.text: まさか、こんなことになるなんて……

translations.en: I can't believe this is happening…

script.text: でも、みんなで仲良くするだけだよ

translations.en: But it's easy if we all just get along‚ right?

script.text: すっごい簡単じゃない？

translations.en: Isn't it super simple?

script.text: でも、あの三人だし……

translations.en: But those three…

script.text: 全然、簡単じゃないように思えるのは私だけかしら

translations.en: I don't know‚ it doesn't seem easy at all to me.
